component_placeholder_rule: replace [A] with [*], parse sanitize=False, sanitize with SANITIZE_ALL excluding SANITIZE_KEKULIZE, then MolToSmiles(canonical=True,isomericSmiles=True,kekuleSmiles=False)
role_aware_identity_string: full canonical + ||D: + donor canonical + ||A: + acceptor canonical
hash_rule: hash only frozen identity string; RDKit version is metadata, not hash content
partition_invariant: one structure_group_id_v1 remains wholly in one partition
geometry_mapping: index+element+role+bond exact match, else complete role-aware graph isomorphism; truncation/failure UNRESOLVED
